creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
With DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf I get on building
these ports:

/!\ netcdf-4.4.1.1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\
 
Please set LICENSE for this port
 
/!\ netcdf-fortran-4.4.4_1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\
 
Please set LICENSE for this port

Thanks

Anton
